notif.welcome_desc: Experience online movie watching powered by KKPhim.
notif.favorites_desc: You pinned {count} movies. Access them directly on your favorites board.
notif.history_desc: Resume watching "{name}" right where you left off.
splash.subtitle: ONLINE MOVIE PLATFORM
onboard.title: Welcome to Konnn's Cinema
onboard.subtitle: Get started in 3 simple steps
onboard.step1_desc: Enjoy a wide variety of movies, from films and series to anime.
onboard.step2_desc: Store movies you wish to watch in your personal favorites board with a single tap.
onboard.step3_desc: Automatically back up playback progress so you can resume at any time.
home.no_favorites: No movies pinned yet. Tap the heart icon on any movie to show it here.
home.no_history: Watch history is empty. Start watching a title to track it here.
filter.title: FILTER ENGINE DECK
search.no_match_desc: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.
movie.no_description: No detailed description available for this title.
fav.title: Pinned Favorites
fav.empty_desc: Tap the heart icon on any movie card to save titles here.
history.title: Continue Watching
history.empty_desc: Movies you have started watching will show here for easy continuation.
settings.title: Preferences & Settings
settings.auto_advance_desc: Automatically advances to next episode on finish
settings.image_enhancer_desc: Applies sharpening visual filter boost inside player
settings.playback_speed_desc: Sets active multiplier speed for beginning sessions
settings.home_sorting_desc: Select which genres you want prioritized on your Home layout rows
settings.nuke_warning: This action will clear all favorites, watch logs, and reset settings.
watch.error_stream: Failed to load video stream. Try switching stream servers below.
watch.light_off: Dims surrounding layout ambient lights for focused viewing.
watch.player_control_mute: Key M to Toggle mute audio volume
watch.player_control_fs: Key F to Enter / Exit full-screen
episode.select_server: Choose server then select desired episode below
footer.description: A curated collection of movies, regularly updated and easy to enjoy.
footer.disclaimer: This platform is built exclusively for research, learning, and non-commercial technical demonstration. No movie files are hosted, owned, or stored on this server. All streaming contents belong to their respective third-party provider APIs.
splash.description: Explore a diverse collection of movies designed for film enthusiasts.
home.hero_desc: Explore this featured movie on Konnn's Cinema.
movie.ticket_stub: A decorative ticket stub UI replicating classic physical theater admission slips.
episode.no_episodes: No episodes cataloged for this node
player.enhance_desc: Contrast booster & texture sharpen filter overlay.
watch.no_episodes_parsed: No episodes parsed for this node
common.confirm_clear_history: Are you sure you want to clear your entire watch history?
common.confirm_nuke: CRITICAL: This will wipe your favorites, watch history, reminders, and preferences. Proceed?
watchparty.section_title: Watch Party — watch in sync with friends
watchparty.section_desc: Create a room or enter a 6-character code to join friends watching in real time — synced playback, live chat, and reactions.
watchparty.title: Watch Party
watchparty.nickname_hint: This is how other members in the room will see you. You can change it anytime.
watchparty.episode_change_prompt: The host switched episodes. Follow along?
watchparty.error_chat_cooldown: Please wait before sending another message.
watchparty.error_create_failed: Could not create a room. Try again.
watchparty.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.login_desc: Sign in with Google to sync your watch history and get a verified badge in Watch Party chat.
